Style/medium: Bold vector logo design, flat graphic, no gradients, no drop shadows

Subject:

  Secondary mark: "FA" monogram inside a shield or hexagonal badge form
  Optional subtle graphic element: a horizontal rule or structural line dividing the two words
Scene/backdrop: White background, logo presentation layout
Lighting/mood:
Color palette: Forest green (#1A5C38) and gold (#C9A84C) — two-color only
Materials/textures: Flat vector, clean edges
Text (verbatim): FRONTLINE ADJUSTERS · FA
Constraints:
  No gradients, no photographic elements, no decorative flourishes
  Must read clearly at small sizes (hat embroidery scale)
  Sophisticated, premium, battle-ready tone — not playful or delicate
